decision.title: DOM-based UI with Kaplay for sprites only
decision.context: R-v5.21 mandates event-driven rendering. Full Kaplay canvas UI makes event-driven harder.
decision.choice: Use DOM/HTML+CSS for all UI panels, menus, HUD. Use Kaplay only for map visualization and combat scene sprites. This gives us event-driven rendering naturally via DOM updates.
decision.rationale: Previous eval rounds had glitchy redraws from canvas-based UI. DOM updates are inherently event-driven.

decision.title: Single-page app with scene manager
decision.context: Need scene transitions without page reloads for persistence.
decision.choice: Custom scene manager that swaps DOM content. Scenes: title, map, combat, forge, merchant, dialogue, character-sheet, inventory.
decision.rationale: Simpler than Kaplay scenes for DOM-heavy UI. Full control over transitions.

decision.title: Iconify game-icons for all visual assets
decision.context: G3 requires no raw ASCII. Need icons for rooms, items, spells, entities.
decision.choice: Use @iconify-json/game-icons via iconify-icon web component for all game visuals. Supplement with CSS gradients for backgrounds.
decision.rationale: Already installed. 4000+ game-relevant icons. Web component = easy DOM integration.
